title: Story Duel — Marcus & the wallet
subtitle: Reading = combat. Answers are checked by Ollama when it is running, with keyword backup if offline.
passage: Marcus found a wallet on the ground. No one was around. He looked inside and saw money and an ID. He paused, then walked toward the office.

rounds.title: Main Idea Strike
rounds.prompt: What is the main idea of the passage?
rounds.rubric: Valid if the student states that Marcus finds a wallet and is deciding what to do, or is going to return it / go to the office to turn it in. Accept paraphrases.

rounds.title: Inference Shield
rounds.prompt: What is Marcus most likely thinking or planning to do? Use evidence from the text.
rounds.rubric: Valid if the answer implies returning the wallet, finding the owner, or going to a responsible adult/office. Must connect to evidence (wallet, ID, office).

rounds.title: Theme Finisher
rounds.prompt: What theme or life lesson does the passage suggest?
rounds.rubric: Valid for themes like honesty, integrity, responsibility, doing the right thing when no one is watching.
